summary: Tisagenlecleucel is an approved treatment for adult patients with relapsed or refractory large B-cell lymphoma who have exhausted at least two prior therapies. It demonstrates significant efficacy particularly in cases involving diffuse large B-cell lymphoma and those originating from follicular lymphoma.
